name: TTD vs TPD Centerville

mainEntity.name: Difference between TTD and TPD in Centerville Utah comp?
mainEntity.text: Difference between TTD and TPD in Centerville Utah comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: TTD: 100% off work, full wage replacement. TPD: partial duty, reduced pay offset.

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville claims: TPD lower rate but encourages return. Insurers exaggerate ability; lawyer ensures accurate classification, fights improper reductions.

description: TTD: 100% off work, full wage replacement. TPD: partial duty, reduced pay offset.
